title: Automating workflows and file organization with Antigravity
summary: Google Antigravity automates file system workflows and organization based on time boxes and tags. The tool helps developers manage GitHub repositories and local files across multiple projects to reduce search time and mental fatigue.
writeup: This Google Cloud Tech video demonstrates Google Antigravity, a tool for automating file system workflows and organizing repositories across multiple projects. Organization runs on two schemes: time-based and tag-based. The stated goal is to cut the time developers spend searching for files and to raise coding productivity.
